# soundscript

soundscript is a stricter subset of TypeScript for teams that want stronger guarantees in critical code.

Primary site:
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/

Docs:
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs/getting-started/quick-start
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs/getting-started/soundscript-vs-typescript
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs/getting-started/adopt-in-existing-typescript-apps

Advanced reference:
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs/reference/macros
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs/reference/machine-numerics
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs/reference/newtypes-and-value-classes
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/docs/reference/variance-contracts

Repository:
- https://github.com/soundscript-lang/soundscript

Full index:
- https://soundscript-lang.github.io/website/llms-full.txt
